category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Turkey market access, TSE/EPDK conformity, and minimum efficiency requirements aligned with EU Ecodesign via Presidential Decrees.

title.en: China-to-Turkey Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入土耳其：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入土耳其：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Turkey TSE/EPDK efficiency, CE or Turkish conformity, and EMC/LVD expectations under EU-aligned Presidential Decrees.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与土耳其 TSE/EPDK 能效、CE 或土耳其合规及基于欧盟总统令的 EMC/LVD 要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與土耳其 TSE/EPDK 能效、CE 或土耳其合規及基於歐盟總統令的 EMC/LVD 要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Turkish TSE, EPDK, customs, and national market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行土耳其 TSE、EPDK、海关及市场监管要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行土耳其 TSE、EPDK、海關及市場監管要求。

answer_first.en: Turkey aligns with EU Ecodesign via Presidential Decrees: IE3 mandatory for 0.75–375 kW motors since July 2021; CE marking accepted or Turkish TSE type-exam required for non-CE products; 400 V 50 Hz grid (vs China 380 V) is a minor voltage gap most motors tolerate.
answer_first.zh: 土耳其通过总统令与欧盟生态设计接轨：0.75–375 kW 电机自 2021 年 7 月起强制执行 IE3；CE 标志被接受，非 CE 产品须通过 TSE 型式检验；电网为 400 V 50 Hz（中国为 380 V），大多数电机可承受此轻微电压差异。
answer_first.zht: 土耳其透過總統令與歐盟生態設計接軌：0.75–375 kW 電機自 2021 年 7 月起強制執行 IE3；CE 標誌被接受，非 CE 產品須通過 TSE 型式檢驗；電網為 400 V 50 Hz（中國為 380 V），大多數電機可承受此輕微電壓差異。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
